title: Rubio says Israel, Lebanon reach framework agreement aimed at 'lasting peace and security'
summary_full: Israel and Lebanon agreed to implement a ceasefire. But that is contingent on the paramilitary group Hezbollah agreeing to halt hostilities.
summary_public: Israel and Lebanon agreed to implement a ceasefire. But that is contingent on the paramilitary group Hezbollah agreeing to halt hostilities.
